D ] nifiHt, tffrwrc, *re*tf 28, 1977 <CT?^T % i«98 Na «$j NEW DELHI, MONDAY, FEBRUARY 28,1977 PHALGUNA 9.189' Separata ***!•! fa !*»*• to this Fart In order that It may l>a filed as a icaarate compilation MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION Ncie Delhi, the 28th February 1977 G SJl S6(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section B of the Fresi- dant'a Pennon Act 1861 (30 of 1951). the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the President's Pension Rules. 1&82, namely:— I. (1) These rulas may be called the President's Pension (Amendment) Rules. 1077. (J) They shall com* mto lore* on the date of their publication in tho Official Gazette. 2 In rule 2 of the Presidents Pension Rules, lfl82 {hereinafter referred to as the eaid rules), in clause (al the words "and includes the last Governor General •i India" shall be omitted S After r'Jla 8A of tha aaid rules, the following rule shall be inserted, namely:— - 8B Application, of rules 4 to 6A to the spouse of a retired President, etc.— ill Tha provisions of rules 4 to 6A shall, BO far as may be, apply to t.i» spouse or a retired President and the spousa of a person who dies whih holdmB the office of President US* ) -- 1 of 4 -- j ^ y THE GAZETTE Off INDIA EXTRAORDINARY PART l l — S E C 3(1) (2) AH expenses under this rule shall be borne by the Central Government on production of a certificate by the spouse in Form II or Form III, as the case may be, or by any person authorised by such spouse In this behalf in Form IIB or Form IVA, JS the case may be, appended to these rules " 4 For rule 8 of the said rules, the following rule shall be substituted, namely — "8, Saving.—Nothing m these rules shall be deemed to prevent the Central Government from providing to a retired President, his spouse or the spouse of a person who dies while holding the office of President any facility relating to the medical treatment or attendance or travelling expenses for any journey performed by him or the spouse which is not authorised by rules 4 to 6B.". 5. In Form II of the said rules, in the headme. for the words and figure "In rule 4 , the words, figures and letter "in rule 4 and rule 6B" shall be substituted. 8. After Form IIA of t h e said rules, the following Form shall be Inserted namely.-— "Form IIB ' [Form of certificate referred to in sub-rule (2) of rule 6B] Certified that the amount of Rs (Rupees . . . . i drawn has been expended In connection with the medical treatment/attendance/ consultation of Shrl/Shrimati , , spouse of . . . . . . . . Signature Designation, . , , Date Place " 1. In Form III of the said rules, in the heading, for the words and figure "in rule 6", the words, flgures and letter "in rule 6 and rule 6B", shall be substituted 8. After Form IV of the said rules, the following Form Shall be inserted namely— "Form IVA [Form of certiflcati referred to in sub-rule (2) of rule 9B] Certified tnat the amount of Rs (Rupees drawn on account of travelling expenses has been incurred by— (I) Shrt/Shrirnati . spouse of, OR (II) medical attendant/speclalist/medioal practitioner of Shri/Shrinjah ., spouse of -n connection with medical consultation/attendance/treatment Signature Designation Date.
